name: discord-printer-bot
description: Print messages from a Discord channel to an Epson TM-T70II receipt printer.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/escpos.js && node --check src/printer.js && node --check src/discordContent.js && node --check src/symbolContent.js && node --check src/receiptLineContent.js && node --check src/textLayout.js && node --check src/printBridge.js && node --check tools/linux-printer-status.js && node --check tools/linux-rawprint.js
